name: mkt
label: MKT
description: Market excess return: return on the value-weighted market portfolio minus the risk-free rate.
notes: R pipeline factor; see factor-code/production/

name: smb
label: SMB
description: Small Minus Big: return spread between small-cap and large-cap stocks.
notes: R pipeline factor; see factor-code/production/

name: hml
label: HML
description: High Minus Low: return spread between high and low book-to-market stocks.
notes: R pipeline factor; see factor-code/production/

name: rmw
label: RMW
description: Robust Minus Weak: return spread between firms with high and low operating profitability.
notes: R pipeline factor; see factor-code/production/

name: cma
label: CMA
description: Conservative Minus Aggressive: return spread between firms with low and high asset growth.
notes: R pipeline factor; see factor-code/production/

name: umd
label: UMD
description: Up Minus Down: momentum factor based on past 12-month returns (skipping the most recent month).
notes: R pipeline factor; see factor-code/production/

name: me
label: ME
description: Size factor from the q-factor model: small minus big market equity.
notes: R pipeline factor; see factor-code/production/

name: ia
label: IA
description: Investment factor from the q-factor model: low minus high total asset growth.
notes: R pipeline factor; see factor-code/production/

name: roe
label: ROE
description: Profitability factor from the q-factor model: high minus low return on equity.
notes: R pipeline factor; see factor-code/production/

name: pead
label: PEAD
description: Post-Earnings Announcement Drift (DHS long-horizon factor): stocks with positive earnings surprises continue to outperform.
notes: R pipeline factor; see factor-code/production/

name: fin
label: FIN
description: Composite Financing (DHS short-horizon factor): firms issuing equity and debt tend to underperform.
notes: R pipeline factor; see factor-code/production/

name: qmj
label: QMJ
description: Quality Minus Junk: composite of profitability, growth, safety, and payout signals.
notes: R pipeline factor; see factor-code/production/

name: prof
label: PROF
description: QMJ profitability component: composite of margin, return, and cash flow measures.
notes: R pipeline factor; see factor-code/production/

name: grow
label: GROW
description: QMJ growth component: composite of multi-year growth in profitability measures.
notes: R pipeline factor; see factor-code/production/

name: safe
label: SAFE
description: QMJ safety component: composite of leverage, distress risk, and return volatility.
notes: R pipeline factor; see factor-code/production/

name: bab
label: BAB
description: Betting Against Beta: leveraged low-beta stocks minus de-leveraged high-beta stocks.
notes: R pipeline factor; see factor-code/production/

name: vol
label: VOL
description: Volatility: low total return volatility minus high volatility stocks.
notes: R pipeline factor; see factor-code/production/

name: ivol
label: IVOL
description: Idiosyncratic Volatility: low residual volatility (after removing market exposure) minus high.
notes: R pipeline factor; see factor-code/production/

name: max
label: MAX
description: Lottery Demand: stocks with low maximum daily returns minus those with high max returns.
notes: R pipeline factor; see factor-code/production/

name: mom6
label: MOM6
description: Six-month momentum: stocks with high past 6-month returns minus low.
notes: R pipeline factor; see factor-code/production/

name: mom1
label: MOM1
description: One-month short-term reversal: last month's losers minus last month's winners.
notes: R pipeline factor; see factor-code/production/

name: sue
label: SUE
description: Standardized Unexpected Earnings: quarterly earnings surprise scaled by historical standard deviation — earnings momentum.
notes: Standardized Unexpected Earnings; YoY quarterly earnings change / std over prior 8 qtrs

name: rs
label: RS
description: Revenue Surprise: year-over-year sales change scaled by historical standard deviation — revenue momentum.
notes: Revenue surprise; YoY sales change scaled by historical std over prior 8 qtrs

name: sp
label: SP
description: Sales-to-Price: firms with high revenue relative to market value versus low.
notes: Sales-to-price; ALL 5 methods pass HLZ; BAB strongest (t=+4.65, Sharpe=1.13)

name: ocp
label: OCP
description: Operating Cash Flow to Price: firms with high operating cash flow relative to market value.
notes: Operating cash flow to price

name: dp
label: DP
description: Dividend-to-Price: high dividend yield stocks versus low.
notes: Dividend yield; 20/80 recommended; many non-payers in Thailand

name: cfp
label: CFP
description: Cash Flow to Price: earnings plus depreciation relative to market value.
notes: Cash flow to price; adds D&A back to earnings

name: a_me
label: A/ME
description: Assets-to-Market: total assets (debt + equity) relative to market value.
notes: Assets-to-market; broader than B/M, includes debt in numerator

name: ebp
label: EBP
description: Enterprise Book-to-Price: enterprise book value over enterprise market value — a leverage-adjusted value measure.
notes: Enterprise book / enterprise market; leverage-adjusted value

name: bm_adj_sga
label: BM SGA
description: Intangible-Adjusted Book-to-Market: book value adjusted for capitalized SG&A (intangible capital).
notes: Intangible-adjusted B/M; adj_bv pre-computed in R pipeline

name: bm_adj_sga2
label: BM SGA2
description: Conservative Intangible-Adjusted B/M: book value plus 30% of SG&A relative to market value.
notes: Conservative intangible-adjusted B/M; 30% SG&A capitalization

name: ep
label: EP
description: Earnings-to-Price: net income relative to market value.
notes: Earnings-to-price; 20/80 for fat-tailed earnings

name: rec_turnover
label: REC TURN
description: Receivables Turnover: revenue divided by accounts receivable — measures collection efficiency.
notes: Receivables turnover; 20/80 ONLY (BAB destroys it); highest spanning alpha in study

name: cfoa
label: CFOA
description: Cash Flow to Assets: operating cash flow divided by total assets.
formula: {'wc': 'act - lct', 'd_wc': 'wc - shift(wc, 1)', 'd_ppent': 'ppent - shift(ppent, 1)', 'out': '(ib - d_wc - d_ppent) / at'}
notes: AFP CFOA = (IB - ΔWC - ΔPPENT) / AT; ΔPPENT proxies for CAPX - DP

name: ato
label: ATO
description: Asset Turnover: revenue divided by total assets — a DuPont efficiency component.
notes: Asset turnover; DuPont efficiency component

name: ol
label: OL
description: Operating Leverage: ratio of fixed operating costs (COGS + SG&A) to total assets.
notes: Operating leverage; fixed cost ratio

name: ti_bi
label: TI/BI
description: Tax-to-Book Income: taxable income relative to book income — a measure of earnings quality.
notes: Tax income / book income; pt has ~8% SETSMART coverage — sparse signal

name: pm
label: PM
description: Profit Margin: net income divided by revenue. Reversed in Thailand (high margin underperforms).
notes: THAI REVERSAL: high margin -> underperform; confirmed in Session 2

name: cbop
label: CBOP
description: Cash-Based Operating Profitability: gross profit plus depreciation minus SG&A, scaled by assets.
notes: Cash-based operating profitability; adds D&A back

name: gpa
label: GPA
description: Gross Profitability: gross profit (revenue minus COGS) divided by total assets.
notes: Gross profitability / assets

name: roe_ann
label: ROE
description: Return on Equity: annual net income divided by book equity.
notes: Return on equity (AFP): ib / lagged book equity

name: roa_ann
label: ROA
description: Return on Assets: annual net income divided by total assets.
notes: Return on assets (AFP): income before extraordinary items / total assets

name: cto
label: CTO
description: Capital Turnover: revenue divided by operating assets (PP&E + inventory + receivables).
notes: Capital turnover; uses operating assets only

name: gmar
label: GMAR
description: Gross Margin: gross profit as a percentage of revenue.
notes: Gross profit margin; QMJ profitability component

name: rnoa
label: RNOA
description: Return on Net Operating Assets: EBIT divided by net operating assets.
notes: Return on net operating assets

name: roeq
label: ROE-q
description: Quarterly ROE: quarterly earnings divided by book equity — more timely signal than annual ROE.
notes: Quarterly ROE; more timely than annual roe_ann; HXZ q-factor uses quarterly ROE

name: roaq
label: ROA-q
description: Quarterly ROA: quarterly earnings divided by total assets — more timely signal than annual ROA.
notes: Quarterly ROA; more timely update than annual roa_ann

name: gpq
label: GP-q
description: Quarterly Gross Profitability: gross profit divided by lagged total assets, updated quarterly.
notes: Quarterly gross profitability; 1-quarter-lagged total assets as denominator

name: earn_acc
label: EARN-ACC
description: Earnings Acceleration: second derivative of quarterly earnings — positive values signal accelerating profitability.
reference: Earnings acceleration (2nd derivative of quarterly earnings)
notes: Sequential earnings momentum; ni_t - 2*ni_{t-1} + ni_{t-2}; positive = accelerating

name: nei
label: NEI
description: Number of Earnings Increases: count of year-over-year earnings increases in the past 8 quarters (earnings streak).
notes: Earnings streak; count of YoY earnings increases in past 8 quarters (range 0-8)

name: eiss
label: EISS
description: Equity Issuance: change in shares outstanding scaled by assets — firms issuing equity tend to underperform.
notes: AFP EISS = -log(shares_t/shares_{t-1}); long_high = less issuance = quality payout; same portfolio as long_low of raw share change

name: nsi
label: NSI
description: Net Stock Issuance: percentage change in shares outstanding — a market-timing signal.
notes: Net stock issuance; market-timing signal

name: oa
label: OA
description: Operating Accruals: the non-cash component of earnings (net income minus operating cash flow) scaled by assets.
notes: Operating accruals; same formula as acc_qmj (quality framing)

name: nxf
label: NXF
description: Net External Financing: combined equity and debt issuance scaled by assets.
notes: Net external financing (equity + debt issuance)

name: ivg
label: IVG
description: Inventory Growth (scaled): change in inventory relative to total assets.
notes: Inventory growth scaled by assets

name: ivc
label: IVC
description: Inventory Growth (percentage): percentage change in inventory — a demand disappointment signal.
notes: Inventory growth (percentage); demand disappointment signal

name: ig
label: IG
description: Investment Growth: year-over-year total asset growth — the core investment anomaly.
notes: Total asset growth; core investment anomaly

name: noa
label: NOA
description: Net Operating Assets: cumulative investment proxy based on operating assets minus operating liabilities.
notes: Net operating assets; cumulative over-investment

name: dpia
label: DPIA
description: PP&E Growth: year-over-year growth in property, plant, and equipment.
notes: PP&E growth; physical capital investment

name: poa
label: POA
description: Physical Investment: capital expenditure proxy (change in PP&E plus depreciation) scaled by assets.
notes: Physical investment intensity; capex proxy

name: ccc
label: CCC
description: Cash Conversion Cycle: days inventory outstanding plus days receivables outstanding minus days payable outstanding — high CCC signals capital inefficiency.
notes: Cash Conversion Cycle = DIO + DRO - DPO (days); high CCC = capital inefficiency

name: accrq
label: ACCRQ
description: Quarterly Accruals: quarterly earnings minus operating cash flow divided by assets — high accruals signal lower earnings quality.
notes: Quarterly accruals = (earnings - operating cash flow) / assets; high accruals underperform

name: acc_qmj
label: ACC
description: Accruals Quality: the non-cash component of earnings — low accruals signal higher earnings quality.
notes: Accruals quality (QMJ framing); BAB method preferred (t=+3.63)

name: dcfoa
label: DCFOA
description: Change in Cash Flow to Assets: year-over-year improvement in operating cash flow generation.
formula: {'wc': 'act - lct', 'd_wc': 'wc - shift(wc, 1)', 'd_ppent': 'ppent - shift(ppent, 1)', 'cf': 'ib - d_wc - d_ppent', 'd_wc3': 'shift(wc, 3) - shift(wc, 4)', 'd_ppent3': 'shift(ppent, 3) - shift(ppent, 4)', 'cf3': 'shift(ib, 3) - d_wc3 - d_ppent3', 'res_t': 'cf / csho - rf_annual * shift(at, 1) / shift(csho, 1)', 'res_t3': 'cf3 / shift(csho, 3) - shift(rf_annual, 3) * shift(at, 4) / shift(csho, 4)', 'denom': 'shift(at, 3) / shift(csho, 3)', 'out': '(res_t - res_t3) / denom'}
notes: AFP 3-yr residual ΔCFOA per share; CF = IB - ΔWC - ΔPPENT (CAPX proxy)

name: lev
label: LEV
description: Low Leverage: firms with low long-term debt relative to assets (safer balance sheets).
notes: Negative leverage; QMJ SAFE component; high = low debt = safer

name: lev_full
label: LEV FULL
description: Low Full Leverage: firms with low total debt (including short-term and preferred) relative to assets.
notes: Full debt stack negative leverage; QMJ LEV

name: dgpoa
label: DGPOA
description: Change in Gross Profitability: year-over-year improvement in gross profit to assets.
formula: {'gp': 'revt - cogs', 'res_t': 'gp / csho - rf_annual * shift(at, 1) / shift(csho, 1)', 'res_t3': 'shift(gp, 3) / shift(csho, 3) - shift(rf_annual, 3) * shift(at, 4) / shift(csho, 4)', 'denom': 'shift(at, 3) / shift(csho, 3)', 'out': '(res_t - res_t3) / denom'}
notes: AFP 3-yr residual ΔGPOA per share; residual = gross profit minus rf × lagged assets

name: dgmar
label: DGMAR
description: Change in Gross Margin: year-over-year improvement in gross profit as a share of revenue.
notes: AFP 3-yr ΔGMAR; no rf adjustment (per-share cancels in ratio); gmar_t - gmar_{t-3}

name: droa
label: DROA
description: Change in ROA: year-over-year improvement in return on assets.
formula: {'res_t': 'ib / csho - rf_annual * shift(at, 1) / shift(csho, 1)', 'res_t3': 'shift(ib, 3) / shift(csho, 3) - shift(rf_annual, 3) * shift(at, 4) / shift(csho, 4)', 'denom': 'shift(at, 3) / shift(csho, 3)', 'out': '(res_t - res_t3) / denom'}
notes: AFP 3-yr residual ΔROA per share; residual = ib minus rf × lagged assets

name: droe
label: DROE
description: Change in ROE: year-over-year improvement in return on equity.
formula: {'res_t': 'ib / csho - rf_annual * shift(ceq, 1) / shift(csho, 1)', 'res_t3': 'shift(ib, 3) / shift(csho, 3) - shift(rf_annual, 3) * shift(ceq, 4) / shift(csho, 4)', 'denom': 'shift(ceq, 3) / shift(csho, 3)', 'out': '(res_t - res_t3) / denom'}
notes: AFP 3-yr residual ΔROE per share; residual = ib minus rf × lagged book equity

name: zscore_book
label: Z BOOK
description: Altman Z-Score (book): financial distress measure using only accounting data.
notes: Z-Score book-value variant; pure accounting, no market prices

name: zscore_mkt
label: Z MKT
description: Altman Z-Score (market): financial distress measure using market value of equity.
notes: Z-Score market-value variant; uses mv in solvency term

name: evol
label: EVOL
description: Earnings Volatility: 20-quarter standard deviation of quarterly ROE — stable earners outperform.
notes: Earnings volatility; 20-quarter std of quarterly ROE; QMJ SAFE component; long_low

name: zscore_q
label: Z-q
description: Altman Z-Score (quarterly): financial distress measure updated quarterly using accounting data.
notes: Quarterly Altman Z-Score; M_RETAIN_EARNING is raw column name in quarterly_data.parquet

name: cfvol
label: CFVOL
description: Cash Flow Volatility: 16-quarter standard deviation of operating cash flow to sales — stable cash flows signal quality.
notes: Cash flow volatility; 16-quarter std of OCF/sales; long_low (stable cash flow = quality)

name: oscore
label: OSCORE
description: Ohlson O-Score: accounting-based probability of bankruptcy; low-distress firms outperform.
formula: {'be_raw': 'if_else(seq == seq, seq, if_else(ceq + pstk == ceq + pstk, ceq + pstk, at - lt))', 'mv_fy_safe': 'if_else(mv_fy == mv_fy, mv_fy, 0)', 'adj_at_raw': 'at + 0.1 * (mv_fy_safe - be_raw)', 'adj_at': 'if_else(adj_at_raw > at, adj_at_raw, at)', 'adj_at_cpi': 'if_else(adj_at / cpi > 0.000001, adj_at / cpi, 0.000001)', 'act_safe': 'if_else(act > 0.000001, act, 0.000001)', 'lt_safe': 'if_else(lt > 0.000001, lt, 0.000001)', 'tlta': 'lt / adj_at', 'wcta': '(act - lct) / adj_at', 'clca': 'lct / act_safe', 'oeneg': 'if_else(lt > at, 1, 0)', 'nita': 'ib / at', 'pt_safe': 'if_else(pt == pt, pt, ebit)', 'dp_safe': 'if_else(dp == dp, dp, 0)', 'futl': '(pt_safe + dp_safe) / lt_safe', 'lag_ib': 'shift(ib, 1)', 'lag_ib_safe': 'if_else(lag_ib == lag_ib, lag_ib, ib)', 'intwo': 'if_else(ib < 0, 1, 0) * if_else(lag_ib_safe < 0, 1, 0)', 'chin_denom_raw': 'abs(ib) + abs(lag_ib_safe)', 'chin_denom': 'if_else(chin_denom_raw > 0.000001, chin_denom_raw, 0.000001)', 'chin': '(ib - lag_ib_safe) / chin_denom', 'raw_o': '-1.32 - 0.407 * log(adj_at_cpi) + 6.03 * tlta - 1.43 * wcta + 0.076 * clca - 1.72 * oeneg - 2.37 * nita - 1.83 * futl + 0.285 * intwo - 0.521 * chin', 'out': '-raw_o'}
notes: AFP O-Score (negated: higher = safer); R-matched: be=fcoalesce(seq,ceq+pstk,at-lt), pmax guards on act/lt/adj_at_cpi, fcoalesce(pt,ebit), fcoalesce(dp,0), fcoalesce(lag_ib,ib)

name: diss
label: DISS
description: Debt Issuance: log change in long-term debt — firms reducing debt outperform those increasing it.
notes: AFP DISS = -log(totd_t/totd_{t-1}); log1p convention avoids log(0) for zero-debt firms; high = less debt issuance = quality payout

name: npop
label: NPOP
description: Net Payout to Price: count of years with positive net payout relative to price — consistent payout signals quality.
notes: AFP NPOP = 5-yr Σ(IB - ΔBE) / 5-yr Σ(REVT - COGS); net payout over profits

name: turn
label: TURN
description: Share Turnover: trading volume relative to market value — low turnover stocks tend to earn a premium.
notes: Turnover; monthly frequency; 20/80 for fat-tailed distribution

name: str
label: STR
description: Short-Term Reversal: last month's return — losers bounce back, winners pull back.
notes: Short-term reversal; expected identical to zoo mom1

name: illiq
label: ILLIQ
description: Illiquidity: Amihud's measure of price impact — illiquid stocks earn a premium.
notes: R pipeline factor; see factor-code/production/
